root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no )as member_name , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description , pkb_repyear.fp_loan_sum_int( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account , sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account )as total_int , sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year , sysdate from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj , sc_acc_m_account_year where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in ('60','61') and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > '0' and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year > extract(year from sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract) --and sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no = '009039' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no
